name: Wide Spectacle
description: A grand performance space where the environment itself becomes the spectacle.
hld_patterns: {setting}. The scale of the space dwarfs the figures, making their performance feel monumental.
{setting}. Light, architecture, and movement conspire into a single overwhelming image.
{setting}. From the back row, the stage is an entire world rendered small and luminous.

1: {subject}, center of frame, facing toward camera, very small in frame against the vast space.
2: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right, small in frame.
{subject}, right third of frame, facing left, small in frame, mirrored position.
3: {subject}, far left of frame, facing right, foreground, small in frame.
{subject}, center of frame, facing camera, furthest from lens, smallest in frame.
{subject}, far right of frame, facing left, slightly forward of center.
4: {subject}, far left of frame, facing right, foreground.
{subject}, far right of frame, facing left, furthest from lens, smallest in frame.

background_pool: Massive amphitheater with tiered stone seating rising into darkness, spotlights creating pillars of white light that reach the vaulted ceiling, the stage a glowing rectangle far below
Stadium stage with enormous LED screens flanking both sides, laser arrays fanning out over a darkened crowd visible only as a glittering texture of reflections, pyrotechnic smoke drifting upward
Grand opera house with gilded balconies and a painted ceiling far overhead, the orchestra pit a dark curve between stage and the shadowed front rows, chandelier dimmed to a faint amber glow

Open-air festival stage at night, a canopy of stars visible above the rigging, colored spotlights crossing in the air like search beams, the crowd an impressionistic field of distant lights and faint smoke
action_pool: Arms stretched fully outward to both sides, body forming a T
One fist driven upward, the other pulled back to the shoulder
Whole body curved backward in a deep arch, arms trailing
Knees bent deeply, torso coiled, weight centered low
Head thrown fully back, arms raised in a V above
One leg swept high to the side, arms carved in opposition
Torso angled forward at forty-five degrees, arms spread behind
Both hands clenched at the sides, shoulders raised, body rigid
Body suspended mid-spin, limbs extended in all directions
Chest pressed forward, chin lifted high, arms carved back behind the torso
